notes: Brazil are significantly hampered: Raphinha (hamstring) is officially ruled out until at least the quarter-finals, Lucas Paquetá (thigh) is highly unlikely to feature and may be done for the tournament, Rodrygo and Estêvão were already absent pre-tournament, and Casemiro is a major doubt after being subbed against Japan with adductor discomfort — leaving Vinicius Jr. carrying an enormous creative burden. Norway arrive in comparatively excellent health with no new injuries or suspensions…
